sourcesContent:
// src/data/products.js  — 12 Artificial Jewellery Products

export const CATEGORIES = ['All', 'Necklaces', 'Earrings', 'Bracelets', 'Rings', 'Bangles', 'Anklets', 'Hair Accessories'];

export const products = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: 'Royal Kundan Necklace Set',
    price: 899,
    originalPrice: 1299,
    category: 'Necklaces',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1599643478518-a784e5dc4c8f?w=450&q=80',
    description: 'Exquisite kundan necklace with matching jhumka earrings, gold-plated finish',
    badge: 'Best Seller',
    rating: 4.8,
    reviews: 124,
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: 'Pearl Cascade Drop Earrings',
    price: 349,
    originalPrice: 499,
    category: 'Earrings',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1535632066927-ab7c9ab60908?w=450&q=80',
    description: 'Layered faux-pearl drop earrings perfect for festive occasions',
    badge: 'New Arrival',
    rating: 4.6,
    reviews: 87,
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: 'Oxidised Silver Cuff Bracelet',
    price: 449,
    originalPrice: 650,
    category: 'Bracelets',
    image: '',
    description: 'Handcrafted oxidised cuff with floral motifs, adjustable size',
    badge: null,
    rating: 4.5,
    reviews: 63,
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    name: 'Diamond-Look Solitaire Ring',
    price: 299,
    originalPrice: 449,
    category: 'Rings',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1605100804763-247f67b3557e?w=450&q=80',
    description: 'Brilliant-cut zircon solitaire set in rose-gold plated band',
    badge: 'Today\'s Deal',
    rating: 4.7,
    reviews: 156,
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    name: 'Crystal Pendant Necklace',
    price: 399,
    originalPrice: 599,
    category: 'Necklaces',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1515562141207-7a88fb7ce338?w=450&q=80',
    description: 'Delicate crystal pendant on gold-filled chain, 18-inch length',
    badge: null,
    rating: 4.4,
    reviews: 92,
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    name: 'Meenakari Gold Bangles (6 pcs)',
    price: 699,
    originalPrice: 999,
    category: 'Bangles',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1588444837495-c6cfeb53f32d?w=450&q=80',
    description: 'Vibrant meenakari enamel work bangles, set of 6, gold plated',
    badge: 'Gift Idea',
    rating: 4.9,
    reviews: 201,
  },
  {
    id: 7,
    name: 'Boho Layered Anklet Set',
    price: 249,
    originalPrice: 349,
    category: 'Anklets',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1617038260897-41a1f14a8ca0?w=450&q=80',
    description: 'Three-layered beaded anklet set with tiny golden charms',
    badge: null,
    rating: 4.3,
    reviews: 45,
  },
  {
    id: 8,
    name: 'Jhumka Chandelier Earrings',
    price: 399,
    originalPrice: 549,
    category: 'Earrings',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1596944924616-7b38e7cfac36?w=450&q=80',
    description: 'Traditional jhumka with dangling chain drops, antique gold finish',
    badge: 'Best Seller',
    rating: 4.8,
    reviews: 178,
  },
  {
    id: 9,
    name: 'Emerald Statement Choker',
    price: 799,
    originalPrice: 1099,
    category: 'Necklaces',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1619119069152-a2b331eb392a?w=450&q=80',
    description: 'Bold emerald-green stone choker for bridal or party wear',
    badge: 'New Arrival',
    rating: 4.6,
    reviews: 68,
  },
  {
    id: 10,
    name: 'Kundan Maang Tikka',
    price: 549,
    originalPrice: 799,
    category: 'Hair Accessories',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611085583191-a3b181a88401?w=450&q=80',
    description: 'Intricate kundan maang tikka with pearl drops for bridal look',
    badge: 'Gift Idea',
    rating: 4.7,
    reviews: 112,
  },
  {
    id: 11,
    name: 'Rainbow Stackable Rings (5 pcs)',
    price: 449,
    originalPrice: 649,
    category: 'Rings',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1598560917505-59a3ad559071?w=450&q=80',
    description: 'Colourful stackable rings set, mix-and-match statement look',
    badge: 'Today\'s Deal',
    rating: 4.5,
    reviews: 89,
  },
  {
    id: 12,
    name: 'Pearl & Gold Layered Necklace',
    price: 649,
    originalPrice: 899,
    category: 'Necklaces',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1630016583820-e6ab7451d390?w=450&q=80',
    description: 'Multi-layer pearl strand with gold-tone chain, elegant everyday wear',
    badge: null,
    rating: 4.6,
    reviews: 134,
  },
];

export default products;
